description:
Kaya visits a shopping mall with her father, and Mobuo casually follows them. When a specter appears...
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Shopping Center wa Kowakunai / Oshioki Heya wa Kowakunai?
Shopping Malls Aren`t Scary / The Punishment Room Isn`t Scary?
ショッピングセンターはコワくない / お仕置き部屋はコワくない?
